blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,406 ft. Looking ahead, 45 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 19" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
